decisions.decision: TikTok activated 2026-05-11 — overrode the durable Q3 2026 deferral
decisions.rationale: Carlos explicit decision this session. Handler scaffolded, hub badge flipped, CLAUDE.md updated, deploy workflow plumbed. Q3 2026 was a CAPACITY decision — now that Higgsfield + Kling 3.0 are accessible, content production isn't capacity-bound.

decisions.decision: Force-push to main via --force-with-lease=main:cace3bf13... (consolidate 13 fragmented commits → 4 named)
decisions.rationale: Carlos explicit decision (option B from earlier in session). Run queue was clear at push time. Tree byte-identical. Auto-save daemon was acknowledged as risk but operation completed before daemon fired again.
decisions.verified: git diff origin/main = empty before push; git push output: + cace3bf13...974c95c3b main -> main (forced update)

decisions.decision: Token-gate tt_publish via MIGRATE_TOKEN (mirroring fb_publish pattern, not ig_publish admin-session pattern)
decisions.rationale: Publishing handlers should be invokable from GH Actions cron / external schedulers. Session-admin gating (ig_publish) requires CRM cookie which CI doesn't have. fb_publish chose MIGRATE_TOKEN for the same reason — keep consistent.

decisions.decision: Parallel folder for Higgsfield assets (assets/social/higgsfield/) rather than overwriting existing handmade
decisions.rationale: A/B test feasibility — keep both sets available until Carlos confirms Higgsfield versions are better. Manifest with job IDs preserved per asset for re-generation.

decisions.decision: Use nano_banana_flash (named 'Nano Banana 2' in UI) per Carlos's literal request — not nano_banana_2 (named 'Nano Banana Pro')
decisions.rationale: Respect the literal model name Carlos requested. Pro may be better for typography-heavy slides — escalate per asset if Flash text rendering is poor.

uncommitted_files: crm-vanilla/backup-status.json (auto-managed, NOT my work — daemon updates on every Stop hook)
next_action: When resuming: (1) check Higgsfield job 417e43b4-af81-41b4-8333-874d8d6e0c9b status via show_generations or job_display, (2) re-present scope tiers if Carlos hasn't picked, (3) if tier is locked, begin batch generation by reading existing carousel/reel assets to mirror the structure into assets/social/higgsfield/.
context_notes: Carlos and I have been compressing several days of work into one session. Pace is intentional — he wants forward motion and pushes back when I gate on questions. But infrastructure decisions still need his sign-off (tier scope, brand character, FB content pick) because Higgsfield credits and brand voice are non-recoverable once spent. Smoke test is the right move — gives him visual signal before committing scope.

anti_patterns_discovered.manifestation: While I was building the schema fix, the daemon fired 13 times over 70 minutes — committing partial work as 'backup: auto-save <timestamp>' commits that mixed unrelated files (leads CSV regen, screenshot batches). Required surgical force-push to consolidate.
anti_patterns_discovered.mitigation: For long surgical operations: (a) do everything within a single Claude turn (Stop hook only fires when Claude responds to user), (b) when consolidation is needed, soft-reset to pre-fragmentation SHA and cherry-pick named commits, (c) force-with-lease against the expected SHA so daemon races fail-safe.

anti_patterns_discovered.manifestation: Plain curl to https://netwebmedia.com/assets/social/carousels/*.png returned 406. Initially looked like missing files. Real browser UA returns 200.
anti_patterns_discovered.mitigation: CLAUDE.md already documents this in the migrate.php section. For any HEAD/GET against netwebmedia.com, always send Mozilla/Chrome UA + Origin/Referer headers. Meta/TikTok image fetchers use real UAs, so this is a CI/Claude-side issue only — production fetchers from third parties will succeed.
